questions.question: Write a client-server program in Python using sockets to allow a client to send a file name to the server and receive the contents of the requested file if present. Explain the steps involved in the process.
questions.hint: Use sockets for communication between client and server

questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'sendfile' system call in the client-server program? Explain its usage with a suitable example.
questions.hint: Explain the usage of sendfile in a real-world scenario

questions.question: Design a client-server program to handle two types of requests: (1) Send a file to the server and (2) Receive a file from the server. Ensure the program handles errors and exceptions properly.
questions.hint: Use try-except blocks to handle errors and exceptions
